_comment: Sign the accountAssociation block with the project's Farcaster custody wallet using the Farcaster manifest tool at https://farcaster.xyz/~/developers/mini-apps/manifest — paste the resulting header/payload/signature in below. Until signed, social previews and rich embeds will still work; only 'Add Mini App' attribution requires the signature.

miniapp.name: Burger Money
miniapp.subtitle: Charity memecoin on Base
miniapp.description: Charity-first memecoin on Base. All creator revenue funds hunger-relief donations and $BURGERS buyback-and-burn.
miniapp.ogDescription: Charity memecoin on Base. Every trade funds a meal.
